mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICE WHERE BOARD_DEL_FL = 'N'
AND BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%'

SELECT N.BOARD_NO, N.BOARD_TITLE, N.BOARD_CONTENT, N.BOARD_WRITE_DATE, N.BOARD_VIEW_COUNT, N.BOARD_DEL_FL, N.THUMBNAIL_URL, N.CATEGORY_NO, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, C.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName FROM NOTICE N JOIN MEMBER M USING (MEMBER_NO) JOIN NOTICE_CATEGORY C ON N.CATEGORY_NO = C.CATEGORY_NO WHERE BOARD_NO = #{no} AND BOARD_DEL_FL = 'N'
